entities.name: GROUNDNUT
entities.description: The primary crop studied in the value chain analysis in South India

entities.name: COVID-19 PANDEMIC
entities.description: A global health crisis that caused disruptions in agricultural value chains

entities.name: VALUE CHAIN
entities.description: The sequence of processes and actors involved in the production and distribution of groundnuts

entities.name: ANANTHAPURAMU DISTRICT
entities.description: The specific district in Andhra Pradesh where the study was conducted

entities.name: ANDHRA PRADESH
entities.description: A leading groundnut producing state in south India

entities.name: SOUTH INDIA
entities.description: The broader geographic region where the study took place

entities.name: FARMERS
entities.description: The primary producers in the groundnut value chain

entities.name: FARM PRODUCTION
entities.description: The process of growing and harvesting crops on a farm

entities.name: DIET DIVERSITY
entities.description: The variety of foods consumed by individuals, which decreased during the pandemic

entities.name: HOUSEHOLD INCOME
entities.description: The total income received by a household, which declined due to production disruptions

entities.name: CONSUMER FOOD PRICES
entities.description: The prices paid by consumers for food, which increased during the pandemic

entities.name: STORAGE INFRASTRUCTURE
entities.description: Facilities used to store crops to preserve value and income

entities.name: PUBLIC DISTRIBUTION SYSTEM
entities.description: A government system for distributing essential food grains

entities.name: WHEAT
entities.description: A grain provided through the public distribution system

entities.name: RICE
entities.description: A grain provided through the public distribution system

entities.name: FARMER'S COLLECTIVES
entities.description: Groups of farmers organized to reduce negative impacts and increase bargaining power

entities.name: NATURAL DISASTERS
entities.description: Events like the COVID-19 pandemic that cause disruptions

entities.name: SMALLHOLDER FARMERS
entities.description: Farmers with small landholdings who are organized by collectives

entities.name: TRANSACTION COSTS
entities.description: Costs associated with the exchange of goods and services

entities.name: BARGAINING POWER
entities.description: The ability of farmers to negotiate better prices and terms

entities.name: FARM EXTENSION SERVICES
entities.description: Services providing technical knowledge and market information to farmers

entities.name: MARKET INFORMATION
entities.description: Data regarding market prices and demand provided through extension services
